evals.prompt: Challenge this: I'm thinking about adding a cron job that runs every 30 minutes, checks the SQLite tracing DB for failed runs, and automatically re-dispatches them with adjusted parameters. The cron agent would read the failure traces, classify the error type, generate a fix hypothesis, and resubmit. What am I missing?
evals.expected_output: A structured report critiquing the inline cron plan from all 3 angles, with prior-art research on auto-retry/self-healing agent systems
